backend/main.mo: Motoko actor exposing deduplicateComicText, removing repeated text lines using a Set and trapping on empty input.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing comic‑asset updates, alt‑text revisions, and related components/tests for three features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing major frontend files, including styling, hooks, components, and comic data utilities.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH theme variables, light/dark mode values, and global border/background styling.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point loading the React app with a Spider-Verse themed title.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component wiring theme, settings, transcript handling, speech errors, and rendering header, controls, viewer, and footer.
frontend/src/components/ComicPanel.tsx: Wrapper component applying comic panel styling and variant backgrounds around panel content.
frontend/src/components/ComicParts.tsx: Set of styled components for captions, speech bubbles, thought bubbles, SFX text, and scene labels.
frontend/src/components/ComicViewer.tsx: Renders story and credit panels with optional deduplication, illustrations, panel parts, and stats badges.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer showing copyright, caffeine.ai link, and Spider‑Man creator credits.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Comic‑styled masthead with app title and light/dark theme toggle.
frontend/src/components/RepetitionRemova: UI control allowing users to enable or disable deduplication via a switch.
frontend/src/components/StoryListeningCo: UI component for starting and stopping speech recognition and sending transcript/error updates to the parent.
Displays the transcript with word count and provides copy and clear actions.
frontend/src/contexts/ComicSettingsConte: Context providing a flag and setter for enabling or disabling repetition removal.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to Internet Identity, refreshing dependent queries when it changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication state, login/clear actions, and initializes AuthClient with stored identities.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query mutation hook calling actor.deduplicateComicText and invalidating related queries.
Custom hook wrapping browser speech recognition with transcript, interim text, error handling, and start/stop controls.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind-based comic‑style theme defining colors, typography, textures, and panel styling.
frontend/src/lib/comicData.ts: Defines structured comic panel data for the Spider-Verse story, including illustrations and text parts for each panel.
frontend/src/lib/comicModel.ts: Provides TypeScript types for comic panels and a utility to extract text lines from panels.
frontend/src/lib/deduplication.ts: Implements functions to deduplicate text lines and panel parts, plus a helper to count total text lines.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a utility function that merges class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with Internet Identity and React Query providers before rendering App.
frontend/src/types/web-speech.d.ts: Defines TypeScript ambient types for the Web Speech API, including recognition events and interfaces.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind CSS with plugins, theme extensions, custom colors, fonts, and animations.
project_state.json: Stores project metadata, feature requirements, and image update needs related to comic panel visuals.
